sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: Let me continue visiting waypoints. I need to find the current white diamond position and the remaining waypoints.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']

print("=== Waypoints with children ===")
for n in nodes:
    if n['children'] and n['pixels'] <= 25:
        if n['boundary']:
            rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
            cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
            center = f"~({sum(rows)//len(rows)}, {sum(cols)//len(cols)})"
        else:
            center = "?"
        print(f"  {n['color']} px={n['pixels']} {center}")

# Progress bar
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] == 'W' and n['pixels'] > 10:
        print(f"\nProgress bar: px={n['pixels']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
